chunks.text: Richard Dorrance | EECS at UC Berkeley Richard Dorrance: Faculty Home Page Larger Photo Richard Dorrance Lecturer Contact Information rdorrance@berkeley.edu Links Biography Richard Dorrance will be teaching EE 251B in Spring 2026. He received his Ph.

aching EE 251B in Spring 2026. He received his Ph.D. from UCLA in 2015. He is currently a systems research scientist at Intel Corporation. His areas of interest include machine learning algorithms and hardware for wireless communications, remote and

hardware for wireless communications, remote and autonomous driving systems, wireless signal processing, and compute-in-memory systems. Teaching Schedule EECS 251B. Advanced Digital Integrated Circuits and Systems , Fr 13:00-15:59, Cory 540AB
